# 📝 Pull Request

## 📋 Description

Please include a summary of the changes and which issue is fixed. Please also include relevant motivation and context.

Fixes # (issue number)

## 🎯 Type of Change

What type of change does this PR introduce?

- [ ] 📚 Documentation content (non-code)
- [ ] ✏️ Typo fix
- [ ] ➕ Content addition (new guide/section)
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (incorrect information)
- [ ] 🔄 Content update/improvement
- [ ] 🏗️ Structure change (reorganization)
- [ ] 🔧 Other (describe below)

## 📍 Affected Section(s)

Which section(s) does this PR affect?
- [ ] 00-06: Foundations
- [ ] 07-14: Core Development
- [ ] 15-24: Advanced Topics
- [ ] 25-29: Resources
- [ ] Root files (README, CONTRIBUTING, etc.)

Specific sections modified:
- [Section XX - Name]
- [Section YY - Name]

## ✅ Checklist

Before submitting this PR, please confirm:

- [ ] I have read the [Contributing Guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My changes follow the markdown style guide
- [ ] I have checked for broken links
- [ ] I have added necessary context/explanations
- [ ] My content is accurate and up-to-date
- [ ] I have used clear headings and formatting
- [ ] Code examples (if any) are tested and working
- [ ] Images/diagrams (if any) are properly optimized

## 📸 Screenshots (if applicable)

If your changes include visual elements, please add screenshots.

## 🤔 Additional Context

Add any other information about this PR here:
- Why these changes are needed
- Any trade-offs considered
- Future improvements that could be made

## 👥 Collaboration

- [ ] I'm open to feedback and revisions
- [ ] I can help review similar PRs in the future
- [ ] I'd like to be tagged as a contributor for this section

**Thank you for contributing to Vibe Coding: Zero to Hero!** 🚀
